item.title: Bless Her Heart
item.description: Well, bless her heart! Miss Lindsey must have had a right powerful case of the vapors and pitched a conniption fit and a hissy fit at the same dang time. Ah do declare she’s really stepped in the stinky poo this time. Was she tryin’ to distract us from those naughty files by mentioning them? Miss Lindsey has sorely miscalculated and needs to fix this expeditiously, if not sooner.

item.dc:creator: 5ywjdPumpkinPrincess

item.title: Texas used 83,000 cameras to track a woman who had an abortion. Nobody can find a case of even 100 cameras used to find a rapist. Thousands of rape kits sit untested. The priorities are clarifying.
item.description: Texas police deployed 83,000 surveillance cameras to track down a woman who had an abortion. EIGHTY THREE THOUSAND. That is not a typo. That is not a rounding error. That is the full mobilization of a state surveillance apparatus — the kind of infrastructure that would make an authoritarian regime blush — deployed against a woman for a medical procedure. Nobody — and I mean NOBODY — can find a documented case of police deploying even 100 cameras to track down a rapist. Not 83,000. Not 1,000. Not 100. The surveillance state that cannot locate sexual predators somehow found every camera in Texas the moment a uterus made a decision it disagreed with. The priorities are clarifying. 83,000 cameras. For a woman. Who had a legal medical procedure in another state. Meanwhile rape kits sit untested in evidence lockers across Texas in their THOUSANDS. The technology exists. The infrastructure exists. The will exists — it just requires a target the state has decided deserves it. This is not about babies. It never was. ⛓️ 83,000 cameras to find a woman who had an abortion. Fewer than 100 to find rapists. The math is not complicated. The message is not subtle. Texas has built a surveillance state and pointed it exclusively at women's bodies. Un fucking real indeed. ⚖️ #83000Cameras #TexasAbortionBan #ReproductiveRights #SurveillanceState #RapeKitBacklog #TexasCops #BodyAutonomy #UnfuckingReal
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.description:

23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alain Delon
"A lot of people mistake a short memory for a clear conscience." - Doug Larson So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Memes and such
item.dc:creator: OlksPolks

item.title: Dumps of Unusual Size 301: More Unsorted Memes, Part Six
item.description:
"I’m not the world’s greatest expert, but I would have thought the wizards, witches, trolls… would have given her a clue." --Sir Terry Pratchett, mocking J.K. Rowling’s claim that she did not write fantasy
I think this is the original (or very early) board for Monopoly before Parker Brothers got their hands on it.
Be excellent to each other.
Previous Unsorted Meme Dumps: https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-296-more-unsorted-memes-part-one-OKU0Qq5 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-297-more-unsorted-memes-part-two-9IDS6Ip https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-298-more-unsorted-memes-part-three-4GF1u82 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-299-more-unsorted-memes-part-four-Tq3TzIK https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-300-more-unsorted-memes-part-five-DAvj92Q https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-175-unsorted-memes-part-one-5otMcCN https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-176-unsorted-memes-part-two-ZHWudsD https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-177-unsorted-memes-part-three-E6hiogu https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-178-unsorted-memes-part-four-5emouti https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-179-unsorted-memes-part-five-F7izf2U https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-180-unsorted-memes-part-six-xPXzAuO https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-181-unsorted-memes-part-seven-RTOkdC0 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-182-unsorted-memes-part-eight-HopxAiO https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-183-unsorted-memes-part-nine-Ox3FvFv https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-184-unsorted-memes-part-ten-DF2KNvU https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-185-unsorted-memes-part-eleven-cQ6RjD3 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-186-unsorted-memes-part-twelve-jBbsvwG

item.dc:creator: HuskyHairExtraordinaire

item.title: The last 80s New Wave Synthpop band
item.description: Brighter Than a Thousand Suns is a recent band that got tired of all the Retrowave, Vaporwave, etc bands that merely imitate the 80s without actually hitting the mark. They go through great pains to make sure they do things the old way so that they'd easily slot into an 80s radio station and people would just think they're hearing an obscure band actually from the 80s. Here's the official music video for the song in this post: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_HxLbr2y8s
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy

item.title: Toxicity (Oglaf)
item.description: If I had a forest like that around, I would get shit faced often and become a forest lover. Not nature lover though. Not sexy enough.
item.dc:creator: Rastifan

item.title: Religious Fanatic Lunatics
item.description: They call themselves Christian nationalists. The second word is key. They have reduced “Christian” from a standalone noun to an adjective. Their preachers are frauds who use their followers to fund a lavish lifestyle by telling them that they can have it, too – if they do what they’re told to do, think what they’re told to think, and believe what they’re told to believe. “Christian” nationalism is a cult well on the way to becoming a terrorist organization. That’s not an extreme thing to say. Look at how many of them advocate violence “in the name of god”. Then look at how many have actually committed violence already.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Cat Allergies [OC]
item.description:
Sponsored by Pacagen! I know, I know! The cat mom comics lady is allergic to cats?! But it’s true! I’d given up any hope of owning a cat, but then the science came through for me! You see, it’s not actually the dander we’re allergic to, but certain proteins that get stuck to it. By adding a tiny amount of Pacagen powder to my cats' food, those proteins are neutralized at the source, so they can’t go floating around the house and up my nose! I’ve been a Pacagen customer for a while, and liked the product so much I asked them if I could do this comic in return for some precious kitty cuddlin’ powder! Wow what a difference it makes!
Get your Pacagen Allergy Reducing Powder here! https://pacagen.com/en-us/products/cat-allergen-reducing-supplement
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: The Evolution of 'Trap'
item.description: This week I take a deep dive into my weird history with Reddit, and why it's all mostly bots now... Bots forever... Check out the whole convo here: https://youtu.be/nuR_87oDT7c Disclaimer: My YouTube content revenue all goes to Trans charities - I put this cause this is my art I make and love sharing with you all here, and folks have been getting weird about it lately.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: I really can not grasp that she is so racistly angry that she can just "absentmindedly" swing her dog around like that.
item.description: when my dog is with me in public, my concern is 100% about maintaining his safety & wellbeing. If I got jumped, I'd be trying to protect him first. If I saw a car barreling towards me, I'd throw my dog out of the way before myself. If I was hungry, he'd get snackos first... Then there's this broad just tossing her accessory around cause she needed to get a few hits in. SMH ⁷
item.dc:creator: Jamesstin

item.title: Emma gets bamboozled by a bratwurst
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1740 (owl with a chainsaw)
item.description:
Lets get this bread
I dreamed I knew the world was going to be destroyed by a decent chunk of antimatter in a given amount of time (about an hour or two?) and I had to gather 15 people to keep the species alive and aliens would rescue us and carry us elsewhere and I'm like: "Bruh, the best fifteen people i would select pretty much dont want to have kids. Also there is no way that would be a healthy genetic founding population. Unless you have some sort of magic tech, you'd need a minimum of 100 people. And these 15 people I'd choose are not even local to me. I think you misunderstand the nature of how fucked up our society is." "Either choose someone else and a proper number, or leave us alone and let us as a species and a world die. But if you have tech for me to bring my 15 best friends to me to watch the world end with a couple of six-packs and some bottles from my apocalypse stash, I will accept." Cue a time skip and me and 15 friends drinking out in the Utah desert watching a hunk of antimatter crash into the earth and us singing Tom Lehrer.
Different West African alphabetic scripts
I have joked about if I was absurdly rich, I would own a replica Drakkar [Norse longship] and raid houseboats in Lake Powell
Heheheheheheh
Harvesters by Vincent Van Gogh. Probably not the exact name of the painting but I just woke up and have not had enough coffee to trundle through internet searching.
Yeah that tracks with the people I know
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "I [undecipherable conure jibberish] good boy Pippin" ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Let's see how this goes
item.description: I was talking to a coworker about the live action One Piece (that I also like) and the conversation moved to Cowboy Bebop. I know it heavily diverted from the anime (I've watched that several times since I was a kid) but I liked it. Also, I think the casting was solid.
item.dc:creator: PleaseRespectMyAsshole

item.title: Remember: if you see someone stealing from a data center, no you didn't!
item.dc:creator: BarnegatLight

item.title: Ex-Bell call centre agent broke their NDA: agents had 9 min per call, 90 sec hold time, trained to hang up on you, earned $400/month, sanctioned for peeing. Bell posted record fucking profits. Then did Bell Let's Talk day.
item.description: A former Bell overseas call centre agent just broke their NDA to explain why you waited 45 minutes and got hung up on. Ready? Agents had 9 MINUTES per call. Go one second over: written up. 90 seconds of hold time TOTAL. Problem unsolvable in 6 minutes? They were silently trained to hang up. Bell called this "customer service." The agents doing this earned $400-600 CAD A MONTH. Rode packed buses for hours to get there. Worked 10-hour shifts with 15-minute breaks. Got sanctioned for being 60 seconds late to PEE. And while YOU screamed at them, a supervisor whispered in their earpiece: "Get them off the phone." Crying in the bathroom between calls was NORMAL. Bell knows about every hangup, every fake ticket, every broken human. Their quality team MONITORS IT. They count on burnout keeping wages low and preventing unionisation. Meanwhile Bell executives post RECORD PROFITS and point to "network investments." The customer experience is not a bug. It is a FEATURE. And then — AND THEN — they do "Bell Let's Talk" day. About MENTAL HEALTH. $400/month. Sanctioned for peeing. Trained to hang up. Record profits. "Bell Let's Talk." An ex-agent broke their NDA because the machine has to stop. Bell Canada has built a monument to corporate cruelty and painted a ribbon on it. Let's make this too loud to ignore. #BellLetsTalk #BellCanada #CallCentreAbuse #BreakingNDA #CorporateGreed #BellCustomerService #LetsMakeThisLoud #EatTheRich https://www.reddit.com/r/bell/s/dTL7n2fgFo
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge
